notes: Generated with built-in image generation from a project-local reference contact sheet of the existing five starter identities.
The prompt preserved each identity hook while morphing the subjects into future-war, neon-lit, black-outlined mechanical pixel-art units.

The generated sheet used a flat #ff00ff chroma key. Background was removed with the imagegen remove_chroma_key.py helper, then each inner grid cell was cropped and centered into a 192x192 runtime PNG.
These are base-pass horror overrides reused across tiers until dedicated four-form horror evolution sheets are generated.
